strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud platforms (AWS CDK)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills with Docker, Kubernetes, GitLab CI, and automated testing frameworks
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume, despite being primary stack requirements
Lack of clear evidence of Kotlin or Java production use beyond legacy/educational contexts
German language proficiency is only basic, potentially limiting collaboration in Berlin-based enterprise team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates 6+ years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes, plus direct AI-agent infrastructure work — aligning strongly with core responsibilities. However, there is no mention of Nest.js or Vitest, which are explicitly required primary stack technologies, and while Java/Kotlin are listed in skills, no production use is cited. The absence of these key stack items creates significant risk despite strong overall experience.
